name: SR-71 Blackbird
description: The fastest air-breathing manned aircraft in history, used for strategic reconnaissance.
history: Developed by Lockheed's Skunk Works, it operated at speeds and altitudes that allowed it to outrun surface-to-air missiles.

name: Airbus A380
description: The world's largest passenger airliner, a double-deck wide-body jet.
history: Designed to challenge Boeing's monopoly in the large-aircraft market, it first flew in 2005.

name: F-22 Raptor
description: A fifth-generation stealth tactical fighter aircraft.
history: The Raptor is a critical component of the USAF, combining stealth, supercruise, and maneuverability.
